title: Add Documentation to an API
summary: W02 Team Activity: Add Documentation to an API For this team activity, your group will be given a Node.js project similar to the one you've been working on and add API documentation to it. Download this project as your starting point. [this project: https://github.com/byui-cse/cse341-ww-student-code/tree/w02-2-team-start]
